notable_rows.finding: route selector chose masked_cell_87_79 on a numerical tie with primary_route, but the local command source was dynamic_window and topology_command_influence stayed null
primary_route selected; masked_cell_71_87 rejected by lower_topology_selection_score

interpretation.observed: Topology alternatives were present and scored on 98 steps, but scored alternatives lost with lower_topology_selection_score on 98 rejected hypotheses. The only non-primary selector choice was a near-zero numerical tie and did not produce a topology-command influence switch.
interpretation.limitation: This is a single diagnostic trace and not benchmark-strength mitigation evidence.
interpretation.recommendation: Revise topology scoring or route-diversity terms before downstream planner tuning; do not treat primary-route dominance as an absence-of-alternatives problem for this slice.
